title: Convert the validated current Demo Sandbox snapshot
objective: Amend the approved owner-only allowlist converter to accept the current validated Sandbox snapshot while preserving deterministic retry IDs and every excluded-data boundary.
acceptanceCriteria: Accept only a current Sandbox snapshot that already passed the Sandbox validator.
Build a fresh owner-only object graph through the approved explicit allowlist; never deep-copy Sandbox or source template state.
Preserve complete edited itinerary and Checklist values within the allowed Clone contract.
Generate new room, place, and Checklist IDs and derive retry IDs deterministically from operationId and source keys.

Exclude fictional members, expenses, settlements, tickets, attachments, Storage paths, Demo/Sandbox IDs, Demo-only fields, guidance, example URLs, order numbers, old timestamps, audit state, and credential-like data.
Mark copied text-only places unverified and preserve owner-or-unassigned Checklist assignees.
Prove conversion mutates neither the current Sandbox snapshot nor the immutable source template.
Do not Reset Sandbox after conversion or successful Clone.
